---
title: "Finnish Greenhouse Productivity"
---

## Row
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
import numpy as np

# Data Preprocessing

df = pd.read_csv("gh_yields.csv")
df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)

def get_common_base_year(df, variables):
    return (
        df.dropna(subset=variables)
          .groupby('Crop')['Year']
          .min()
    )

def transform_index(df, variables):
    base_year = get_common_base_year(df, variables)
    
    indices = {'Year': df['Year'], 'Crop': df['Crop']}
    
    for v in variables:
        base_values = (
            df.set_index(['Crop', 'Year'])[v]
        )
        
        indices[v] = df.groupby('Crop')[v].transform(
            lambda x: x / base_values.loc[x.name, base_year.loc[x.name]] * 100
        )
    
    return pd.DataFrame(indices)

indices = transform_index(df, ['Area', 'Yield', 'Productivity'])


from scipy.stats import linregress

# 1. Calculate statistics
def get_stats(group):

    pct_std = group['Productivity'].pct_change(fill_method
=None).std()

    clean_data = group['Productivity'].dropna()
    if len(clean_data) > 2:
        log_y = np.log(clean_data)
        x = np.arange(len(log_y)) # The time delta is 1 year
        slope = linregress(x, log_y).slope
        # convert the slope to percent change in Y. 
        slope = (np.exp(slope) - 1) * 100
    else:
        slope = np.nan
    
    return pd.Series({
        'sum_area': group['Area'].sum(),
        'pct_std': pct_std,
        'growth_rate': slope
    })

stats_df = df.groupby('Crop').apply(get_stats).reset_index()

# merge for sorting of facets
indices = indices.merge(stats_df[['Crop', 'pct_std']], on='Crop')

# get the list of crops to maintain consistent colors
crops = stats_df['Crop'].unique().tolist()

```

```{python}
#| fig-height: 12
#| out-height: "100%"

# Visualization

# For selecting crop from scatter plot
selection = alt.selection_point(fields=['Crop'], on='click', toggle=True, value='Tomatoes', empty=False)

base = alt.Chart(stats_df).encode(
    x=alt.X('growth_rate:Q', 
            title='Estimated Growth in Productivity (%)',
            scale=alt.Scale(zero=False)),
    y=alt.Y('pct_std:Q', 
            title='Variability (Standard Deviation of % Change in Productivity)',
            scale=alt.Scale(zero=False)),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip('Crop:N'),
        alt.Tooltip('growth_rate:Q', format='.2f', title='Growth Rate'),
        alt.Tooltip('pct_std:Q', format='.3f', title='Variability'),
        alt.Tooltip('sum_area:Q', format=',.0f', title='Cumulative Cultivation Area')
    ]
)

# The Scatter Points
points = base.mark_circle(stroke='black').add_params(
    selection
).encode(
    size=alt.Size('sum_area:Q'). 
                  title('Cumulative Cultivation Area (m^2)').scale(range=[100, 2000]).legend(orient='bottom'),
    color=alt.Color('Crop:N', legend=None).scale(domain=crops, scheme='tableau20'),
    strokeWidth=alt.when(selection).then(alt.StrokeWidthValue(1.5)).otherwise(alt.StrokeWidthValue(0))
)

# Interactive Labels
labels = base.mark_text(
    align='left',
    baseline='middle',
    dx=12,
    fontSize=12
).encode(
    text='Crop:N',
).transform_filter(selection)

# Facet line charts
base = alt.Chart(indices).transform_fold(
    ['Area', 'Yield', 'Productivity'],
    as_=['key', 'Index Value']
).encode(
    alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year').scale(domain=[2014, 2025]).axis(grid=True),
    alt.Y('Index Value:Q').title('Index Value').axis(grid=False),
    color=alt.Color('key:N').legend(title=" ")
).transform_filter(
    selection
).properties(
    width=180,
    height=150
)
    
lines = base.mark_line(opacity=1, point=True).encode(
    strokeWidth=alt.when('datum.key == "Productivity"').then(alt.StrokeWidthValue(3)).otherwise(alt.StrokeWidthValue(2))
)

# TODO:
# baseline = base.transform_calculate(
#     baseline='100'
# ).mark_line(color='black', strokeDash=[1,1]).encode(
#     y='baseline:Q'
# )

line_chart = lines # + baseline

details_chart = line_chart.facet(
    facet=alt.Facet('Crop:N', title=None).sort(field='pct_std', op='max', order='ascending'),
    columns=1,
    
).properties(
    title={
        "text": "Index Charts for Selected Crops",
        "subtitle": ["Uses variable baseline."]
    }
)

main = (points + labels).properties(
    title={
        "text": "Crop Productivity Growth vs. Variability",
        "subtitle": ["Click on crop to explore. Hold the Shift key while clicking to select multiple crops."]
    },
    width=600,
    height=400)

# Layer and Configure
alt.hconcat(main, details_chart).configure_view(stroke=None).resolve_scale(
     strokeWidth='independent',
     color='independent',
).resolve_legend(
    color='independent',
    size='independent'
)

```
